properties.verseOrder: v1 v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v2 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is a light that burns in the darkness There is a hope that washes the fear away There is a peace that settles around us It is Your love that sets our hearts ablaze

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Father we're on our knees With every heartbeat we bring you this offering Lord come and fill this place Father we're crying out Spirit we need you now Glorious love surrounds us Lord come and fill this place

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There is a King that reigns in victory There is a Mercy strong enough to save We feel it rising up from the ashes There is a Love that overcame the grave There is a Love that overcame the grave

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Father we're on our knees With every heartbeat we bring you this offering Lord come and fill this place Father we're crying out Spirit we need you now Glorious love surrounds us Lord come and fill this place Lord come and fill this place

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: /: And I will worship you I will worship you I will worship you Always :/ x6

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And I will worship you I will worship you I will worship you Always
